_comment: Informational only — Tier 2 (mini-swe-agent with bash + persistent gdb session) does not consume tool flags. mini-swe-agent's tool registry is built directly in tier2_runner.py: BASH_TOOL plus GDB_TOOL, dispatched by a custom LocalGdbBashEnvironment that holds a long-lived gdb subprocess. This file exists so run_id_for() / heatmap_real.py / analyze.py can pivot on tool_config without special-casing tier 2, and so researchers grep'ing for 'tier2' find a real artifact.
